summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SipCircle Follow System (hybrid follow with approval). All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Follow requests, approval/denial, privacy settings, and notification badges all functional.

issues: Notification badge only shows when user has require_follow_approval enabled - this is correct behavior but may confuse users who don't have it enabled

backend: POST /api/follow/{id} - Direct follow when approval not required
POST /api/follow/{id} - Creates pending request when approval required
GET /api/follow-requests - Returns list of pending requests
POST /api/follow-requests/{id}/approve - Approves request and adds to followers
GET /api/user/{username} - Returns is_following and is_pending status
GET /api/bartender/{username} - Returns is_following and is_pending status
Already following returns success with status=following
Already pending returns success with status=pending
frontend: Edit Profile page shows Privacy Settings with 'Require Follow Approval' toggle
Follow Requests page (/follow-requests) loads with empty state
Universal user profile (/u/:username) shows Follow button with correct state
Follow button changes to 'Requested' when approval required
Follow button changes to 'Following' when approval not required
Cancel pending request works (button returns to 'Follow')
Bottom nav shows 'Requests' tab for both bartenders and customers
Notification badge appears on Requests nav when pending requests exist

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Follow system correctly handles all edge cases (already following, already pending, self-follow)
Privacy settings properly integrated into both bartender and customer profile updates

test_credentials.note: Test accounts created during testing with random IDs

seed_data_creation: No seed data required - tests create their own test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Follow system fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Privacy toggle in EditProfile enables/disables follow approval, 2) FollowRequestsPage shows pending requests with Accept/Reject buttons, 3) BottomNav shows notification badge for pending requests, 4) Follow button states: Follow -> Requested -> Following, 5) Universal user profile at /u/:username works for any user type. All API endpoints working correctly.

features_tested.follow_requests_page: PASS - Displays pending requests with Accept/Reject buttons
features_tested.follow_button_states: PASS - Follow -> Requested -> Following based on approval setting
features_tested.privacy_toggle: PASS - Require Follow Approval toggle in EditProfile works
features_tested.notification_badge: PASS - Shows count of pending requests in bottom nav
features_tested.universal_user_profile: PASS - /u/:username shows any user with follow functionality
features_tested.cancel_pending_request: PASS - Clicking Requested button cancels the request
